structured_payload_candidate.title: Cooling-only VAV terminal unit airflow setpoint mapping in cooling state
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: 5.5.5 Control Logic for Cooling-Only VAV Zone
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When the zone state is cooling, the cooling-loop output is mapped to the active airflow setpoint from the minimum endpoint to the cooling maximum endpoint. If the supply air temperature from the air handler is greater than room temperature, the active airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Cooling-loop output mapped to active airflow setpoint from minimum endpoint to cooling maximum endpoint. If supply air temperature > room temperature, active airflow setpoint ≤ minimum endpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: When the Zone State is cooling, the cooling-loop output shall be mapped to the active airflow setpoint from the minimum endpoint to the cooling maximum endpoint. a. If supply air temperature from the air handler is greater than room temperature, the active airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint.

evidence_quote: When the Zone State is cooling, the cooling-loop output shall be mapped to the active airflow setpoint from the minimum endpoint to the cooling maximum endpoint. a. If supply air temperature from the air handler is greater than room temperature, the active airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint.
evidence_text: When the Zone State is cooling, the cooling-loop output shall be mapped to the active airflow setpoint from the minimum endpoint to the cooling maximum endpoint. a. If supply air temperature from the air handler is greater than room temperature, the active airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Cooling-only VAV terminal unit airflow setpoint in deadband state
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: 5.5.5 Control Logic for Cooling-Only VAV Zone
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When the zone state is deadband, the active airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: When the Zone State is deadband, the active airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint.

evidence_quote: When the Zone State is deadband, the active airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint.
evidence_text: When the Zone State is deadband, the active airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Cooling-only VAV terminal unit airflow setpoint mapping in heating state
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: 5.5.5 Control Logic for Cooling-Only VAV Zone
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When the zone state is heating, the heating-loop output is mapped to the active airflow setpoint from the minimum endpoint to the heating maximum endpoint. If the supply air temperature from the air handler is less than 3°C (5°F) above the room temperature, the active airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Heating-loop output mapped to active airflow setpoint from minimum endpoint to heating maximum endpoint. If supply air temperature < room temperature + 3°C (5°F), active airflow setpoint ≤ minimum endpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: When the Zone State is heating, the Heating Loop output shall be mapped to the active airflow setpoint from the minimum endpoint to the heating maximum endpoint. a. If supply air temperature from the air handler is less than 3°C (5°F) above the room temperature, the active airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint.

evidence_quote: When the Zone State is heating, the Heating Loop output shall be mapped to the active airflow setpoint from the minimum endpoint to the heating maximum endpoint. a. If supply air temperature from the air handler is less than 3°C (5°F) above the room temperature, the active airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint.
evidence_text: When the Zone State is heating, the Heating Loop output shall be mapped to the active airflow setpoint from the minimum endpoint to the heating maximum endpoint. a. If supply air temperature from the air handler is less than 3°C (5°F) above the room temperature, the active airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint.

structured_payload_candidate.title: VAV damper modulation to maintain measured airflow at active setpoint
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: 5.5.5 Control Logic for Cooling-Only VAV Zone
structured_payload_candidate.summary: The VAV damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured airflow at the active setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Always when terminal unit is active
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Modulate VAV damper to maintain measured airflow = active airflow setpoint
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: The VAV damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured airflow at the active setpoint.

evidence_quote: The VAV damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured airflow at the active setpoint.
evidence_text: The VAV damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured airflow at the active setpoint.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Low airflow alarm at 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 4 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Measured airflow < 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes AND setpoint > 0
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Measured airflow < 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint > 0
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If the measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 4 alarm.

evidence_quote: If the measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 4 alarm.
evidence_text: If the measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 4 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Low airflow alarm at 50% of setpoint for 10 minutes
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 3 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Measured airflow < 50% of setpoint for 10 minutes AND setpoint > 0
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Measured airflow < 50% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint > 0
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If the measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 3 alarm.

evidence_quote: If the measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 3 alarm.
evidence_text: If the measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 3 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Suppression of low airflow alarms for zones with importance multiplier of 0
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If a zone has an importance multiplier of 0 for its static pressure reset T&R control loop, low airflow alarms shall be suppressed for that zone.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone importance multiplier = 0 for static pressure reset T&R control loop
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Suppress low airflow alarms for that zone
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If a zone has an importance multiplier of 0 (see Section 5.1.14.2.a.1) for its static pressure reset T&R control loop, low airflow alarms shall be suppressed for that zone.

evidence_quote: If a zone has an importance multiplier of 0 (see Section 5.1.14.2.a.1) for its static pressure reset T&R control loop, low airflow alarms shall be suppressed for that zone.
evidence_text: If a zone has an importance multiplier of 0 (see Section 5.1.14.2.a.1) for its static pressure reset T&R control loop, low airflow alarms shall be suppressed for that zone.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Airflow sensor calibration alarm
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If the fan serving the zone is OFF and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 30 minutes, generate a Level 3 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Fan serving zone is OFF AND airflow sensor reading > max(10% of Vcool-max, 50 cfm) for 30 minutes
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Airflow sensor reading > max(10% of Vcool-max, 50 cfm) for 30 minutes while fan is OFF
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If the fan serving the zone is OFF and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 30 minutes, generate a Level 3 alarm.

evidence_quote: If the fan serving the zone is OFF and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 30 minutes, generate a Level 3 alarm.
evidence_text: If the fan serving the zone is OFF and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 30 minutes, generate a Level 3 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Leaking damper alarm
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If the damper position is 0%, and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 10 minutes while the fan serving the zone is proven on, generate a Level 4 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Damper position = 0% AND airflow sensor reading > max(10% of Vcool-max, 50 cfm) for 10 minutes AND fan serving zone is proven ON
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Damper at 0% but airflow > max(10% of Vcool-max, 50 cfm) for 10 minutes while fan is ON
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If the damper position is 0%, and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 10 minutes while the fan serving the zone is proven on, generate a Level 4 alarm.

evidence_quote: If the damper position is 0%, and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 10 minutes while the fan serving the zone is proven on, generate a Level 4 alarm.
evidence_text: If the damper position is 0%, and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 10 minutes while the fan serving the zone is proven on, generate a Level 4 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Testing/commissioning overrides for cooling-only VAV terminal unit
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Provide software switches that interlock to a system-level point to force zone airflow setpoint to zero, Vcool-max, Vmin, force damper full closed/open, and reset request-hours accumulator point to zero.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Software switches allow forcing airflow setpoint to zero, Vcool-max, Vmin; force damper full closed/open; reset request-hours accumulator to zero.
structured_payload_candidate.commissioning_check: Force zone airflow setpoint to zero, Vcool-max, Vmin; force damper full closed/open; reset request-hours accumulator point to zero.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Provide software switches that interlock to a system-level point to a. force zone airflow setpoint to zero, b. force zone airflow setpoint to Vcool-max, c. force zone airflow setpoint to Vmin, d. force damper full closed/open, and e. reset request-hours accumulator point to zero (provide one point for each reset type listed in the next section).

evidence_quote: Provide software switches that interlock to a system-level point to a. force zone airflow setpoint to zero, b. force zone airflow setpoint to Vcool-max, c. force zone airflow setpoint to Vmin, d. force damper full closed/open, and e. reset request-hours accumulator point to zero (provide one point for each reset type listed in the next section).
evidence_text: Provide software switches that interlock to a system-level point to a. force zone airflow setpoint to zero, b. force zone airflow setpoint to Vcool-max, c. force zone airflow setpoint to Vmin, d. force damper full closed/open, and e. reset request-hours accumulator point to zero (provide one point for each reset type listed in the next section).

structured_payload_candidate.title: Recommendation for reheat box when minimum ventilation rate is high or DCV is used
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If the minimum ventilation rate is more than 25% of the cooling maximum, or DCV is used, a reheat box is recommended to avoid overcooling. DCV logic is not provided for cooling-only boxes because CO2 levels rise faster than cooling load.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Minimum ventilation rate > 25% of Vcool-max OR DCV is used
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Recommend reheat box; do not use DCV logic for cooling-only boxes.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If the minimum ventilation rate is more than 25% or so of the cooling maximum, or DCV is used, a reheat box is recommended to avoid overcooling. DCV logic is not provided for cooling-only boxes, because doing so results in periods of overcooling, as the CO2 levels due to occupants rises much faster than the cooling load due to occupants because of thermal mass.

evidence_quote: If the minimum ventilation rate is more than 25% or so of the cooling maximum, or DCV is used, a reheat box is recommended to avoid overcooling. DCV logic is not provided for cooling-only boxes, because doing so results in periods of overcooling, as the CO2 levels due to occupants rises much faster than the cooling load due to occupants because of thermal mass.
evidence_text: If the minimum ventilation rate is more than 25% or so of the cooling maximum, or DCV is used, a reheat box is recommended to avoid overcooling. DCV logic is not provided for cooling-only boxes, because doing so results in periods of overcooling, as the CO2 levels due to occupants rises much faster than the cooling load due to occupants because of thermal mass.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Cooling-only terminal units can provide heating only when AHU supply air temperature is more than 3°C (5°F) above room temperature
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Cooling-only terminal units can provide heating only when the AHU supply air temperature is more than 3°C (5°F) above the room temperature.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: AHU supply air temperature > room temperature + 3°C (5°F)
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Heating possible via warm supply air
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Cooling-only terminal units can provide heating only when the AHU supply air temperature is more than 3°C (5°F) above the room temperature.

evidence_quote: Cooling-only terminal units can provide heating only when the AHU supply air temperature is more than 3°C (5°F) above the room temperature.
evidence_text: Cooling-only terminal units can provide heating only when the AHU supply air temperature is more than 3°C (5°F) above the room temperature.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Active endpoints as a function of Zone Group mode for cooling-only VAV terminal unit
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Table 5.5.4 defines the active endpoints (cooling maximum, minimum, heating maximum) for each Zone Group mode: Occupied, Cooldown, Setup, Warmup, Setback, Unoccupied.
configurable_values: Cooling maximum: Vcool-max in Occupied, Cooldown, Setup; 0 in Warmup, Setback, Unoccupied
Minimum: Vmin* in Occupied; 0 in all other modes
Heating maximum: Vheat-max in Occupied; 0 in Cooldown, Setup; Vcool-max in Warmup, Setback; 0 in Unoccupied
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
Table 5.5.4 Endpoints as a Function of Zone Group Mode
Endpoint  Occupied  Cooldown  Setup  Warmup  Setback  Unoccupied
Cooling maximum  Vcool-max Vcool-max Vcool-max 0 0 0
Minimum  Vmin*  0 0 0 0 0
Heating maximum  Vheat-max  0 0 Vcool-max Vcool-max 0

evidence_quote:
Table 5.5.4 Endpoints as a Function of Zone Group Mode
Endpoint  Occupied  Cooldown  Setup  Warmup  Setback  Unoccupied
Cooling maximum  Vcool-max Vcool-max Vcool-max 0 0 0
Minimum  Vmin*  0 0 0 0 0
Heating maximum  Vheat-max  0 0 Vcool-max Vcool-max 0
evidence_text:
Table 5.5.4 Endpoints as a Function of Zone Group Mode
Endpoint  Occupied  Cooldown  Setup  Warmup  Setback  Unoccupied
